Active positions in this cycle were force-closed first; overall re-entry is enabled, so a new cycle can start from the same timestamp. This leg PnL is ₹+4719.00 (individual leg can be positive). Note: overall SL is checked using simulated intrabar MTM (open+closed legs) — the combined_mtm_breakdown here shows post-trade close prices which may differ from the simulation's intrabar check.
steps.overall_sl_note: Overall SL threshold: -₹2,500. The engine checks MTM minute-by-minute using simulated intrabar prices. combined_mtm_breakdown shows post-trade close prices (for reference only) — actual trigger may have occurred at a different intrabar price point.
